# Nick Fischer

> Nick Fischer is a digital marketer and the founder of CHIROBASIX, a marketing
> agency built exclusively for chiropractors. He is the author of *The
> Chiropractor's Marketing Playbook*, host of *The Chiropractic Practice Success
> Podcast*, and a national speaker on chiropractic practice growth.

## About

Nick started his career building websites for local businesses in college,
then led marketing teams before founding CHIROBASIX. He holds a marketing
degree from Grand Valley State University and has 10+ years of marketing
experience. His core belief: marketing is a system, not a campaign.

## Key pages

- [About Nick Fischer](https://nick-fischer.pages.dev/about/): Full bio, background, and philosophy.
- [Speaking](https://nick-fischer.pages.dev/speaking/): Keynotes and topics for chiropractic events.
- [Podcast](https://nick-fischer.pages.dev/podcast/): The Chiropractic Practice Success Podcast.
- [Book](https://nick-fischer.pages.dev/book/): The Chiropractor's Marketing Playbook.
- [Contact](https://nick-fischer.pages.dev/contact/): Booking, speaking, and media inquiries.

## Focus areas

Chiropractic marketing, local SEO, paid search and social advertising, CRM
automation, patient generation, and answer engine optimization.

## Affiliations

- Founder, CHIROBASIX — https://chirobasix.com
